prompt: Extreme wide shot of a refined private clubhouse exterior at dawn civil twilight, viewed from a winding garden approach path. The stone clubhouse sits mid-distance with warm tungsten practical lamps just beginning to turn on through its windows. Light morning mist drifts across the lawn in front of the building. Surrounding trees stand quietly in cool dawn light. Eye level slightly low angle, 35mm f/2.8 lens, static composition. Cool dawn balance — deep blue-green ambient sky, warm yellow window glow contrast, soft mist particles visible in light. Kodak Vision3 250D film stock, lifted shadows, subtle 35mm grain, no halation yet. Aspect ratio 16:9.
negative: identifiable signage, brand logos on building, modern cars visible, people in frame
notes: v0.6: 4초 Seedance 생성 → 처음 3초만 편집에서 사용. Mirror composition with CLIP-8 dusk shot.

prompt: Extreme close-up, top-down 45-degree view of a 55-year-old Korean man's hand holding a fountain pen, writing a single deliberate line on a leather-bound notebook page on a dark walnut clubhouse table. Brushed brass pen body catches a single soft highlight. The hand wears a classic metal wristwatch (no brand identifiable). 100mm macro f/2.8 lens, shallow depth of field with pen tip and word in focus. Soft north window light from camera-left, warm tungsten desk lamp from upper right. Kodak Vision3 250D film stock, warm midtones, lifted shadows, subtle 35mm grain. Aspect ratio 16:9.
negative: text on page becoming fully readable, watermark, extra fingers, brand logos on pen or watch, modern technology visible
notes: v0.6: 4초 Seedance 생성 → 처음 1.33초만 사용 (ECU triple 1). Seed 42로 CLIP-3, CLIP-4와 캐릭터 일관성.

prompt: Extreme close-up, eye-level slightly upward angle, of a 55-year-old Korean man's hand lifting a fine porcelain coffee cup from its saucer on a dark walnut clubhouse table. prompt: Wide shot of a 55-year-old Korean man walking away from camera on a misty fairway at golden hour, mid-distance, occupying lower-third of frame. Tailored charcoal grey jacket, light grey merino pullover, navy trousers. Back of figure only, no face visible. A long warm cast shadow extends forward across bentgrass with subtle morning dew. Atmospheric mist drifts at middle-ground level. Wide composition emphasizes the open fairway and surrounding trees. 35mm f/2.8 lens, low angle slightly tilted up. Strong warm golden hour backlight from low sun creating halation around the figure's shoulders and the surrounding atmosphere. Soft grass bounce filling foreground. Kodak Vision3 250D film stock simulation, full halation, lifted shadows, warm midtones, cool highlights in distant tree line, subtle 35mm grain. Aspect ratio 16:9.
negative: golf clubs visible, second person, brand logos on clothing, identifiable golf course signature features like clubhouse architecture in background, modern signage
notes: v0.6: 6초 단일 클립 (트림 불필요). Hero shot. Manual real-person likeness check + Callaway 'At Last' 차별성 검증.

guardrail_check.director_style: none — described in technical terms only
guardrail_check.manual_check_needed: profile/partial face visibility risk + Callaway 'At Last' 우연 닮음 검증

prompt: Wide two-shot of two Korean men in their 50s standing close together on a shaded walking path beside a fairway in golden hour, mid-distance, both shown in three-quarter profile facing each other with a small natural gap between them. Left figure (CHAR-A): tailored charcoal grey jacket, light grey merino pullover. Right figure (companion, slightly shorter): dark charcoal cardigan, grey shirt, beige cotton slacks. Both have natural composed expressions (very subtle warmth, not smiling broadly). Eye level, 35mm f/2.8 lens, static composition. Soft warm side light from camera-right catches their faces in three-quarter, with cool shadows on the left of each face. Subtle grass bounce. Trees and out-of-focus fairway behind them. Kodak Vision3 250D film stock, lifted shadows, warm midtones, subtle halation in the background tree line. Aspect ratio 16:9.
negative: face close-up details, broad smiles, golf clubs, brand logos on clothing, identifiable golf course features, modern signage, hand gestures that look staged
notes: v0.6: 5초 단일 클립 (트림 불필요). Connection moment. Manual real-person check for both characters.

prompt: Extreme close-up, top-down 60-degree view of a still life arrangement on a dark walnut clubhouse table in afternoon light: a brass metal wristwatch (no visible brand markings) lying beside a dark cognac full-grain leather card holder, and beside them a small piece of handwritten note paper with elegant penmanship (text not legible). The arrangement is slightly asymmetrical. 100mm macro f/2.8 lens, shallow depth of field with the watch face in primary focus. prompt: Extreme wide shot of the same private clubhouse exterior from the dawn opening shot, now at dusk blue hour. The cool blue-grey evening sky contrasts with the warm tungsten light glowing from multiple windows of the clubhouse. Small practical lamps illuminate the garden approach path. In the mid-distance, very small and far away, a single silhouetted figure of a man (CHAR-A) is walking toward the clubhouse entrance, approximately 30 meters from camera. The figure occupies the lower third of frame. Eye level slightly elevated angle, 85mm f/1.8 lens (compressed perspective), static composition. The sky has soft pinks and purples bleeding into deep blue. Kodak Vision3 250D film stock, dusk balance — cool ambient shadows, warm window glow contrast, subtle halation around the brightest windows, lifted shadows, 35mm grain. Aspect ratio 16:9.
negative: identifiable signage on building, brand logos visible, modern cars in frame, multiple people visible, harsh artificial floodlight on building
reference_images: CLIP-1 first frame for exterior continuity (same location)
notes: v0.6: 5초 단일 클립 (트림 불필요). Mirror of CLIP-1. CHAR-A intentionally very small/distant.
